message:
test(web): add unit tests for SwipeablePromptCard and Dialog components

Adds test coverage for two previously untested UI components:

SwipeablePromptCard.test.tsx:
- Tests basic prompt card rendering (title, description)
- Tests click handler invocation with correct prompt data
- Mocks required hooks: useHaptic, useIsSmallScreen, useBasket,
  useSwipeHint, useToast
- Notes limitation: JSDOM doesn't fully support pointer events
  needed for swipe gesture testing

dialog.test.tsx:
- Tests Dialog renders trigger and content when defaultOpen
- Tests Dialog opens correctly when trigger is clicked
- Uses Radix UI's Dialog primitive which works with HappyDOM

These tests establish baseline coverage for mobile-specific components
and help catch regressions in the touch/gesture and modal systems.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
